CVE-2019-25058.title: An issue was discovered in USBGuard before 1.1.0. On systems with ...
CVE-2019-25058.summary: An issue was discovered in USBGuard before 1.1.0. On systems with the usbguard-dbus daemon running, an unprivileged user could make USBGuard allow all USB devices to be connected in the future.
